hooks.command: FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$FILE" in *_00-Project-Management/*) (cd "$(jq -r '.cwd')" && npm run --silent pm:lint 2>&1) ;; *) exit 0 ;; esac

CWD=$(jq -r '.cwd'); cd "$CWD" && if git -C "$CWD" diff --name-only HEAD -- _00-Project-Management/ 2>/dev/null | grep -q . || git -C "$CWD" diff --cached --name-only -- _00-Project-Management/ 2>/dev/null | grep -q .; then npm run --silent pm:dash 2>&1; fi
